instances.task_instruction:
You are solving a meal planning task. Fill the 5x2 grid with dish ids.
This meal planning task has 5 planning days as rows and 2 meal slots to fill per day as columns.
Each cell must use exactly one candidate id from that slot.

Across the whole grid, the plan must satisfy these global constraints:
(1) the total calories of all dishes in the whole grid must be at most 5329.
(2) the total protein of all dishes in the whole grid must be at least 291.
(3) the same cuisine can appear at most 7 times in the whole grid.
(4) the same chef can appear at most 8 times in the whole grid.

For the row constraints:
For meal day 0:
(1) the total calories of all dishes in meal day 0 must be at most 1621.
(2) the total protein of all dishes in meal day 0 must be at least 92.
(3) the total price of all dishes in meal day 0 must be at most 56.

For meal day 1:
(1) the total calories of all dishes in meal day 1 must be at most 598.
(2) the total protein of all dishes in meal day 1 must be at least 81.
(3) the total price of all dishes in meal day 1 must be at most 31.

For meal day 2:
(1) the total calories of all dishes in meal day 2 must be at most 718.
(2) the total protein of all dishes in meal day 2 must be at least 25.
(3) the total price of all dishes in meal day 2 must be at most 70.

For meal day 3:
(1) the total calories of all dishes in meal day 3 must be at most 1056.
(2) the total protein of all dishes in meal day 3 must be at least 4.
(3) the total price of all dishes in meal day 3 must be at most 50.

For meal day 4:
(1) the total calories of all dishes in meal day 4 must be at most 1290.
(2) the total protein of all dishes in meal day 4 must be at least 49.
(3) the total price of all dishes in meal day 4 must be at most 45.

For the column constraints:
For meal slot 0:
(1) the total calories of all dishes in meal slot 0 must be at most 2379.
(2) the total protein of all dishes in meal slot 0 must be at least 148.
(3) the maximum spiciness of any dish in meal slot 0 must be at most 5.

For meal slot 1:
(1) the total calories of all dishes in meal slot 1 must be at most 2561.
(2) the total protein of all dishes in meal slot 1 must be at least 156.
(3) the maximum spiciness of any dish in meal slot 1 must be at most 5.

Each slot also has its own local constraints, but those slot-specific limits must be looked up from the dataset/database for that slot before deciding which candidate id to use.
Return only a 5x2 list of dish ids.
